german_requirement.title: German Language Skills Are Not Dominant Requirement
german_requirement.subtitle: Nearly half of roles do not require German, highlighting accessibility challenges.

pm_type.title: Core PMs Dominate Role Landscape
pm_type.subtitle: A significant gap exists between Core PMs and Customer-facing PMs, indicating a concentration in product management roles.

seniority.title: Mid-level Roles Lead in Seniority Mix
seniority.subtitle: Mid-level positions account for 41%, while senior plus roles make up 45%.

work_mode.title: On-site Work Dominates Despite Remote Options
work_mode.subtitle: A significant majority of employees are expected to work on-site, with limited remote flexibility available.

location.title: Berlin Dominates Job Market Concentration
location.subtitle: A significant majority of opportunities are concentrated in Berlin, with minimal remote options available.

ai.title: AI Expertise is Becoming Mainstream in Job Market
ai.subtitle: A significant portion of roles now prioritize AI responsibilities and skills.

industry.title: Industry Roles Exhibit Equal Representation Across Sectors
industry.subtitle: No single sector dominates, but unclassified roles limit overall accessibility.
